dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Oxios Agent OS overview
dashboard.pausedHint: Stream paused. New events are still being received.
dashboard.totalForkedUnavailable: Total forked count is not reported by the /api/status endpoint — backend field missing.
dashboard.approvalsAllClear: No pending approvals. The system is healthy.

onboarding.title: Quick Start
onboarding.subtitle: The system is idle. Get started with one of these actions.
onboarding.chatDesc: Send a prompt directly to an agent

engine.thinkingTypeDescription: Enable extended thinking for complex reasoning tasks
engine.thinkingBudgetDescription: Maximum tokens for thinking output (0 = unlimited)
engine.reasoningEffortDescription: Controls how much reasoning the model performs
engine.textVerbosityDescription: Controls output length and detail level
engine.thinkingLevelDescription: Depth of thinking for reasoning models
engine.apiKeyOverrideHint: Leave blank to keep the current key. Keys are stored securely and never exposed in API responses.
engine.defaultModelDesc: Model used by agents for all tasks
engine.noProvidersConnectedDesc: Add a provider to get started

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Oxios configuration — changes are persisted to disk
settings.failedToSaveSettings: Failed to save settings. Check the server logs.
settings.providerDescription: Choose the LLM provider for your AI models
settings.modelSelectProviderFirst: Select a provider first, then choose a model
settings.apiKeyDescription: Authentication credential for the selected provider
settings.kernelDescription: Core system behavior — agent limits, event bus capacity
settings.workspacePathDescription: Root directory for agent working files
settings.maxConcurrentAgentsDescription: Upper limit on simultaneously running agents
settings.eventBusCapacityDescription: Buffer size for the internal event bus
settings.executionDescription: How agents execute commands on the host
settings.defaultModeDescription: Structured is safer — shell mode requires explicit opt-in
settings.allowShellModeDescription: Enable bash -c execution. Dangerous in production
settings.apiKeyAuthenticationDescription: Require API key for all requests
settings.networkAccessDescription: Allow agents to make outbound network requests
settings.allowForkingDescription: Allow agents to spawn child agents
settings.maxExecutionTimeSDescription: Hard limit on agent task duration
settings.orchestratorDescription: Unified intent handling — assess → crystallize → execute → review
settings.maxEvolutionIterationsDescription: How many times an agent can retry after evaluation failure
settings.activeTokenLimitDescription: Max tokens in the active context window
settings.cacheEntryLimitDescription: Max entries in the context cache
settings.hostDescription: Bind address for the web dashboard
settings.sessionTTLHoursDescription: Auto-delete sessions older than this (0 = unlimited)
settings.autoPruneDescription: Prune expired sessions on every save
settings.updateDescription: Oxios binary and web UI version management

routing.title: Routing
routing.desc: Auto model selection and fallback config
routing.autoDesc: Automatically select optimal model based on task complexity
routing.costEfficientDesc: Prefer cheaper models when performance is equivalent
routing.fallbacksDesc: Models to try in order when the primary model fails
routing.excludedModelsDesc: Models never to use in routing

roles.title: Roles
roles.desc: Named model aliases you can route a chat to. Pick a role in the chat input to switch models for that conversation.
roles.empty: No roles yet. Add one below.
roles.noModel: Pick a model for the new role.
roles.failedSave: Failed to save roles. Check the server logs.

settings.allowedCommandsDescription: Commands agents may run on the host (one per line, or comma-separated). Leave empty to allow all in Permissive mode.
settings.allowlistModeDescription: Permissive: empty list = allow all. Enforced: only listed commands allowed.
settings.allowedToolsDescription: Tools available to agents by default (comma-separated).
settings.maxAuditEntriesDescription: Maximum audit log entries retained in memory.
settings.auditLogPathDescription: Optional file path for persistent audit log. Leave empty for in-memory only.
settings.rateLimitPerMinuteDescription: API requests allowed per minute per client.
settings.memoryDescription: Persistent agent memory, embeddings, learning, dream consolidation
settings.memoryEnabledDescription: Master toggle for the memory subsystem.
settings.embeddingProviderDescription: Which embedding model to use for semantic recall. Switching requires restart.
settings.sonaEnabledDescription: Self-Organizing Neural Architecture — pattern distillation from agent runs.
settings.consolidationPresetDescription: How aggressively to consolidate hot→warm→cold memory tiers.
settings.dreamIntervalHoursDescription: Hours between automatic dream consolidation runs.
settings.auditEnabledDescription: Record agent actions to the tamper-evident audit chain.
settings.auditMaxEntriesDescription: Maximum audit entries before oldest are pruned.
settings.telegramBotTokenEnvDescription: Name of the environment variable holding the Telegram bot token.
settings.telegramAllowedUsersDescription: Telegram user IDs allowed to interact with the bot (one per line). Empty = allow all.
settings.telegramSessionRotationHoursDescription: Auto-rotate session after this many hours of inactivity. 0 = disabled.
settings.telegramSessionMaxMessagesDescription: Auto-rotate session after this many messages. 0 = unlimited.
settings.requiresRestartTooltip: This change requires a daemon restart to take effect ({{scope}} subsystem).
settings.confirmChangesDescription: {{count}} field(s) will be modified. Review before saving.
settings.settingsSaveFailed: Failed to save settings. Check the server logs.
settings.applyLiveDesc: Applied immediately — no daemon restart required.
settings.restartNeededDesc: Requires a daemon restart to take effect.
settings.allowedToolsManualEntry: Catalog tools shown above. Add MCP or custom tools by typing their names.
settings.calendarEnabledDesc: Enable the calendar system for events and reminders
settings.calendarRemindersDesc: One reminder per line (e.g. 15 for 15 min before)
settings.calendarSystemCalendarDesc: Show cron jobs on the calendar
settings.calendarArchiveDaysDesc: Days after which old events are archived
settings.otelSamplingRatioDesc: 0.0 to 1.0 — fraction of traces to export
settings.agentLogMaxEntriesDesc: Maximum agent records to keep (0 = unlimited)
settings.agentLogMaxToolCallsDesc: Cap tool calls persisted per agent (0 = unlimited)
settings.browserEnabledDesc: Enable browser tools for web automation
settings.budgetCallsBudgetDesc: Max tool calls per agent (0 = unlimited)
settings.secretsDescription: Manage API keys and credentials securely
settings.secretTelegramTokenDesc: Token from @BotFather for the Telegram channel
settings.secretOxiosApiKeyDesc: API key for Oxios cloud services
settings.secretDeleteConfirm: Delete this secret? The running engine will lose access immediately.
settings.notifDesktopEnabledDesc: Show OS-level notifications when the tab is in the background
settings.notifCompleteSoundDesc: Play a sound when a task completes
settings.notifErrorSoundDesc: Play a sound when an agent fails
